title: AdminItems
description: This mod adds tools, items, and blocks for admins and OPs.
body:
# AdminItems

I made this mod to add commands, items, blocks, and other stuff for admins and operators.

### **Commands**
**/lighting** - summons a lightning bolt at your location.
![Lightning command](https://ik.imagekit.io/mreddtsh/tr:n-ik_ml_thumbnail/AdminItems/lightning.gif?updatedAt=1775362074419)

**/tnt** - summons a TNT explosion at your location.
![TNT command](https://ik.imagekit.io/mreddtsh/tr:n-ik_ml_thumbnail/AdminItems/tnt.gif?updatedAt=1775362192421)


### **Items**
**Gamemode Switcher** - Opens a menu to switch your gamemode quickly and easily.
![Gamemode Switcher](https://ik.imagekit.io/mreddtsh/tr:n-ik_ml_thumbnail/AdminItems/gamemode.gif?updatedAt=1775362338903)

**Time Changer** - Opens a menu with a slider to select the time.
![Time Changer](https://ik.imagekit.io/mreddtsh/AdminItems/timechanger.gif?updatedAt=1775362391474)

**Entity Deleter** - Hit an entity with it and the entity disappears.
![Entity Deleter](https://ik.imagekit.io/mreddtsh/AdminItems/entitydeleter.gif)

### **Blocks**
**Access Denied Block** - An unbreakable block that kindly tells visitors they're not allowed through.
![Access Denied Block](https://ik.imagekit.io/mreddtsh/AdminItems/accessdeniedblock.gif?updatedAt=1775362437985)

That's all and thank you for supporting my rookie career of making mods. (Also, I apologize for the quality of the GIFs.)
